transcript:
CALLER: Hi. I need to reschedule my DEXA scan. Got the date mixed up in my calendar.
AGENT: No problem! Name and current appointment details?
CALLER: Alka Maheshwari. It was this Monday at 8:30 AM — radiology department.
AGENT: Got it. Next available DEXA slot is Wednesday at 9 AM or next Monday at 8:30 AM. Which suits you?
CALLER: Wednesday 9 AM please.
AGENT: Rescheduled! Alka Maheshwari, Wednesday at 9:00 AM for DEXA scan. Updated confirmation will be sent. Anything else?
CALLER: That's all. Sorry for the confusion.
AGENT: Absolutely no need to apologise! See you Wednesday.
